title: FLEET pipeline-gh-project.sh: jq-path + GraphQL injection class in _ghp_cache_get and interpolated mutations
note: Fix verified applied in BOTH repos. (1) Our composing helper plugins/foundry/skills/roadmapper/scripts/roadmapper-gh-fields.sh shipped in PR #179 (0ad9d3d): jq lookups bind via --arg, GraphQL mutations use literal queries + -f bindings. (2) Upstream FLEET primitive pipeline-gh-project.sh verified against the on-box install (~/.local/share/fleet/pipeline-marketplace/pipeline/scripts/): jq-path injection closed via --arg resolvers _ghp_field_id/_ghp_opt_id (_ghp_status_oid delegates, zero spliced filters) and every GraphQL mutation parameterized with -f/-F bound variables (zero interpolated operands). Both CWE-917 and CWE-89-class sites closed. doc/learnings/fleet-ghproject-injection/ brief retired.
